pageContext.name: The Child Vista Outdoor Picnic Blanket & Tote
pageContext.description: Grass stains and spilled drinks don't stand a chance against the Star Wars The Child Vista Outdoor Blanket! A durable portable picnic blanket with a cozy The Child-themed topside and solid-colored underside that packs compactly into a carry tote with an adjustable carry strap and extra-large pocket.  Don't worry about getting this blanket tote dirty, it's machine washer & dryer safe! Precious cargo, indeed. Make sure to order yours today!  *Machine wash warm and machine dry, medium heat. Do not dry clean. Do not iron.
